items.headline: Philippines declares nationwide fuel rationing as refineries halt operations
items.body: Manila imposed household and transport fuel limits after its two main refineries suspended processing due to crude supply disruptions. The rationing affects 115 million people and marks the country's first peacetime energy emergency since independence.

items.headline: India and China agree to joint patrols in disputed border zone
items.body: Both militaries will conduct coordinated movements in Ladakh's Depsang Plains following talks in New Delhi. The arrangement reverses four years of separate deployments after the 2020 clash that killed dozens.

items.headline: European Central Bank cuts interest rates as inflation falls below target
items.body: The bank lowered its benchmark rate for the third consecutive month as consumer prices dropped. The move signals confidence that energy shocks have passed and prioritises growth over price stability.
